item.title: Prem clubs agree to limit contact in training
item.description: "These changes will allow us to better protect all players as they return after their off-season break," says the Rugby Players' Association.

item.title: Lenders lift mortgage rates as Iran war hits borrowing costs
item.description: Nationwide, HSBC and Coventry Building Society are all putting some mortgage rates up.

item.title: From killing her dog to luxury jets: Six times Kristi Noem made headlines
item.description: Noem boosted deportations during her first year, but her controversies reportedly frustrated Trump.

item.title: In maps: Seven days of strikes across the Middle East
item.description: Israel has continued strikes across Iran and Lebanon as Donald Trump warns action could continue for weeks

item.title: What happens when at the Winter Paralympics?
item.description: Your guide to what's happening and when and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Paralympics in Milan-Cortina.
